name: linkedin-reply-assistant
description: Drafts LinkedIn replies and comments using the user's background, offers, and voice.

interface.shortDescription: Draft grounded LinkedIn replies from your profile and voice.
interface.longDescription: Helps draft thoughtful LinkedIn direct-message replies and post comments using your background, offers, proof points, boundaries, and preferred tone.
defaultPrompt: Draft a warm reply to this LinkedIn DM using my profile.
Write 3 comment options for this post in my voice.
Turn this message into a concise follow-up with a soft CTA.
